# SCORE Manage + Grow Lifecycle Hub

Last reviewed for BOSS Library ingestion: 2026-06-21

## BOSS Library tags
score, manage-grow, operations, growth

## Resource purpose
Stage hub for operating and growing a small business, including marketing, customers, operations, technology, finance, HR, leadership, risk, and compliance topics.

## How the BOSS AI Librarian should use this resource
Use this as the main SCORE hub for businesses that are already selling or operating and need systems, customers, team, cash flow, technology, or growth support.

## Best-fit BOSS lifecycle stage
Mature Operations and Growth, with support for Launch and Recovery/Troubleshooting.

## Route the user here when
The user has customers/revenue or operational activity and is no longer only deciding whether the idea is viable.

## BOSS routing notes
- For struggling businesses, combine with Cash Flow Management, Risk & Compliance, Process Improvement, and mentoring.
- For growth-stage businesses, combine with Advanced Programs and mentor support.

## Related SCORE links
- Advanced programs: https://www.score.org/advanced-programs-for-small-businesses/
- Business Health Check Tool: https://www.score.org/tools/business-health-check-tool/

## Response pattern for BOSS
Use this resource as a routing destination, not as a substitute for professional legal, tax, lending, procurement, or compliance advice. For time-sensitive workshops, deadlines, prices, contact details, or eligibility rules, send the user to the live source URL first.
